name: ecom-cro
description: Build a CRO recommendation package end-to-end. Parses a client brief, audits the website (DOM-first via live browser, screenshots only as fallback), generates ICE-scored audience-aligned recommendations grounded in UX heuristics, validates feasibility, then builds an interactive HTML prototype recreating the client's site with per-rec toggles — plus optional deck handoff package. v0.5 adds on-demand per-rec text export (to chat or recommendations.md file). v0.4 added reusable widget templates and a popup-copy skill tuned for luxury 45+ audiences. Brand-neutral — asks each user for their own style at runtime.
